payloads.name: Future Tools

fields.label: Short description
fields.value: AI career strategist that turns your resume into a personalized career-pivot roadmap.

payloads._harness:
# browser-harness script for Future Tools (futuretools)
new_tab("https://www.futuretools.io/submit-a-tool")
wait_for_load()
ensure_real_tab()
print("== " + "Future Tools" + " submit page ==")
print(page_info())
capture_screenshot()  # before — confirms the form is present / not moved
# Field plan — match each label to its input and type the value:
fill_field(label="Product / tool name", value="AICareerPivot")  # role=productName
fill_field(label="Website URL", value="https://ai-career-pivot.com")  # role=websiteUrl
fill_field(label="Short description", value="AI career strategist that turns your resume into a personalized career-pivot roadmap.")  # role=shortDescription
fill_field(label="Contact email", value="hello@ai-career-pivot.com")  # role=email
capture_screenshot()  # after fill — verify values landed
# submit intentionally NOT clicked (pass --submit to enable)

fields.label: Short description
fields.value: AI career strategist that turns your resume into a personalized career-pivot roadmap.

fields.label: Full description
fields.value: AICareerPivot is your personal AI career strategist. Upload your resume for a free skill-gap analysis, see which career pivots fit you best, and unlock a personalized transition roadmap built around your real skills, finances, and family constraints — with actionable 6-month, 1-year, and 2-year plans. Intro pricing is a $19 one-time unlock, no subscription.

fields.label: Pricing
fields.value: Freemium — Free resume-based skill-gap analysis; full personalized roadmap is a $19 one-time unlock (no subscription).

payloads._harness:
# browser-harness script for ToolPilot AI (toolpilot)
new_tab("https://www.toolpilot.ai/pages/sell-on-toolpilot")
wait_for_load()
ensure_real_tab()
print("== " + "ToolPilot AI" + " submit page ==")
print(page_info())
capture_screenshot()  # before — confirms the form is present / not moved
# Field plan — match each label to its input and type the value:
fill_field(label="Product / tool name", value="AICareerPivot")  # role=productName
fill_field(label="Website URL", value="https://ai-career-pivot.com")  # role=websiteUrl
fill_field(label="Short description", value="AI career strategist that turns your resume into a personalized career-pivot roadmap.")  # role=shortDescription
fill_field(label="Full description", value="AICareerPivot is your personal AI career strategist. Upload your resume for a free skill-gap analysis, see which career pivots fit you best, and unlock a personalized transition roadmap built around your real skills, finances, and family constraints — with actionable 6-month, 1-year, and 2-year plans. Intro pricing is a $19 one-time unlock, no subscription.")  # role=longDescription
fill_field(label="Category", value="AI Career Assistant")  # role=category
fill_field(label="Pricing", value="Freemium — Free resume-based skill-gap analysis; full personalized roadmap is a $19 one-time unlock (no subscription).")  # role=pricing
fill_field(label="Logo URL", value="https://ai-career-pivot.com/og-home.png")  # role=logoUrl
fill_field(label="Contact email", value="hello@ai-career-pivot.com")  # role=email
capture_screenshot()  # after fill — verify values landed
# submit intentionally NOT clicked (pass --submit to enable)
